# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# ARM Template file that creates an Azure Function App alongwith Managed Identity & necessary resources (Storage Account, Key Vault and Cosmos DB). 
parameters:
- name: storageAccountName
  type: string # Name of your Storage account. It should be unique across all existing names in the subscription for this resource provider to ensure idempotence during deployments with unidentified parameters value will still result into creation or update operation but fails if it's already exists by that name which violates Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies
- name: keyVaultName 
  type: string # Name of your Key Vault. It should be globally unique within an Azure Subscription/AAD for this resource provider to ensure idempotence during deployments with unidentified parameters value will still result into creation or update operation but fails if it's already exists by that name which violates IAM policies
- name: cosmosDbName 
  type: string # Name of your Cosmos DB. It should be globally unique within an Azure Subscription/AAD for this resource provider to ensure idempotence during deployments with unidentified parameters value will still result into creation or update operation but fails if it's already exists by that name which violates IAM policies
- default: "<Your Name>"  # The person who is creating the ARM Template. This should be replaced before deployment through CI/CD pipeline for validation purpose and compliance with Azure Best Practices, also can serve as a comment in case of future updates or changes requirements related to these resources during deployments
- default: "<Your Email>"  # The email address associated with the above person who is creating ARM Template. This should be replaced before deployment through CI/CD pipeline for validation purpose and compliance with Azure Best Practices, also can serve as a comment in case of future updates or changes requirements related to these resources during deployments
- name: location 
  type: string # Location where the Resources will reside (like North Europe) [Required]  
resources:
# Create an identity for managing access across all services. This is also used by Azure Functions and other resource providers associated with this managed service principle(s). It should be deleted after use or manually to keep cost down, but can't do it in ARM template itself as deletion will remove the linked Managed Service Principal from these resources
- apiVersion: "2018-09-01"  # Azure API version for this resource provider. (Recommended is currently '2018-09-01')   [Required]    
  type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identityProviders#ResourceProviderConnection
  name: <Your Connection Name>    // You will need to replace it with the actual connection's details for Azure Managed Identity in your environment (Azure Active Directory ID & Secret) - This is also used by other resource providers associated with this managed service principle(s). It should be deleted after use or manually 
- apiVersion: "2019-10-01"   # Update the API version as necessary. The latest recommended one for Managed Identity (Azure AD) is '2019-10-01' at this time, and it should be updated when available or if you want to use Azure Functions built in roles with wildcards
  type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identityProviders#ManagementGroupLinks   # Update the below line as per your requirement (Currently '2019-10-01') and update it every time when Manage Identity updates its API version, to ensure backward compatibility with older versions
  name: <Your Management Group Link Name> // You will need replace this by actual details of the link for management group in your environment. It should be deleted after use or manually  
- apiVersion: "2019-10-01"    # Azure API version recommended is '2019-10-01' at current time, and it also needs to updated when available so that the backward compatibility of older versions can occur. 
  type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines#VirtualMachineExtension   // Update this line as per your requirement (Currently '2019-10-01')    It is used for adding role assignments to VMs created with ARM template which includes Azure Functions and other resource providers associated with Managed Identity.
  name: "<Your Extension Name>" // You will need replace this by actual details of the extension in your environment   [Required]    
- apiVersion: "2019-10-01"    # Update API version as necessary (currently recommended '2019-10-01') and update it every time when Managed Identity updates its APIs.  This will ensure backward compatibility with older versions of resource providers associated to this managed service principle(s).
  type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines#VirtualMachineExtension   // Update as per your requirement (Currently '2019-10-01') and update it every time when Managed Identity updates its APIs, ensuring backward compatibility with older versions of resource providers associated to this managed service principle(s).
  name: "<Your Extension Name>" // You will need replace here by actual details of the extension in your environment. It should be deleted after use or manually   [Required]

tags : [] # Tags can also defined as a list with tagName and its value, e.g., tags : { “team”: "Dev", “stage”: "Test" } for better organization of resources in the ARM template when they are deployed to different environments (e.g Dev/QA)
